benefits.description: Complete healing of chronic duodenal ulcer confirmed by endoscopy; ulcer changed from severely damaged bloody wound to pink, perfect, textbook healthy stomach lining with no wounds
Significant pain reduction after switching to arginine salt BPC-157 oral formulation

protocol_notes: Initial protocol: acetate salt BPC-157 subcutaneous injection for ~2 months with no reported benefit. Later switched to arginine salt BPC-157 oral formulation (form reported as more stable, resistant to heat, acid, and UV). Concurrent use of omeprazole (initial PPI) and later Nexium (esomeprazole) at maximum dose 40mg daily throughout treatment. Patient attributes healing to BPC-157 oral formulation; physician attributed healing to Nexium despite 2+ years of Nexium use showing no improvement. Also took additional vitamins during treatment. Patient was desperate after 2.5 years of chronic ulcer unresponsive to conventional treatment, initially hired 'biohacking coach' who lacked knowledge of arginine salt variant.
